tasks.label: Build Website
tasks.command: & { $log='${workspaceFolder}\z_build.log'; if (Test-Path $log) { Remove-Item $log -Force }; msbuild "${workspaceFolder}\.vscode\WebSite.targets" /nologo /noconlog /t:$env:_MSB_T  /v:$env:_MSB_V "/flp:logfile=$log;verbosity=detailed;encoding=utf-8;forcenoalign" "/p:VirtualPath=/www" "/p:SiteRoot=${workspaceFolder}\www" /m:8; $code=$LASTEXITCODE; if (Test-Path $log) { Get-Content -Path $log }; exit $code }

tasks.label: Rebuild Website
tasks.command: & { $log='${workspaceFolder}\z_build.log'; if (Test-Path $log) { Remove-Item $log -Force }; msbuild "${workspaceFolder}\.vscode\WebSite.targets" /nologo /noconlog /t:$env:_MSB_T  /v:$env:_MSB_V "/flp:logfile=$log;verbosity=detailed;encoding=utf-8;forcenoalign" "/p:VirtualPath=/www" "/p:SiteRoot=${workspaceFolder}\www" /m:8; $code=$LASTEXITCODE; if (Test-Path $log) { Get-Content -Path $log }; exit $code }

tasks.label: Build App_Code
tasks.command: & { $log='${workspaceFolder}\z_build.log'; if (Test-Path $log) { Remove-Item $log -Force }; msbuild "${workspaceFolder}\.vscode\WebSite.targets" /nologo /noconlog /t:$env:_MSB_T  /v:$env:_MSB_V "/flp:logfile=$log;verbosity=detailed;encoding=utf-8;forcenoalign" "/p:VirtualPath=/www" "/p:SiteRoot=${workspaceFolder}\www" /m:8; $code=$LASTEXITCODE; if (Test-Path $log) { Get-Content -Path $log }; exit $code }
